message:
feat(dashboard): implement DaemonAdapter type conversion

Replace interface{} return types in RealDaemon interface with proper
mirror types (DaemonTask, DaemonSnapshot) that match the daemon package's
types. This enables compile-time type safety and actual data conversion
between the daemon and dashboard packages.

The mirror types approach avoids import cycles while maintaining type
safety. A future DashboardFacade in the daemon package will convert
daemon.Task to dashboard.DaemonTask.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
